/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/host/linux-x86_64/portable/gcc-i386-musl/13.3.0/bin/i686-linux-g++ -fPIC -g -nostdlib -Wl,--script=/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/gcc-13.3.0/i386/gnuefi/3.0.17/gnuefi/elf_ia32_efi.lds -Wl,-znocombreloc -Wl,-Bsymbolic -shared -Wl,-soname,libefi_app_ia32.so -o libefi_app_ia32.so CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/efi/efimain.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/efi/elf_loader.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/efi/intf.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/efi/multiboot.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/efi/panic.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/efi/ramdisk.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/efi/setup_graphics.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/efi/utils.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/common/basic_printk.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/common/gfx.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/common/main_common_logic.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/common/simple_elf_loader.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/common/stdio.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/common/asserts.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/common/fat32_base.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/common/itoa.cpp.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/common/misc.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/common/panic.c.o CMakeFiles/efi_app_ia32.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/common/string_util.c.o  /workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/gcc-13.3.0/i386/gnuefi/3.0.17/ia32/gnuefi/crt0-efi-ia32.o /workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/gcc-13.3.0/i386/gnuefi/3.0.17/ia32/lib/libefi.a /workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/gcc-13.3.0/i386/gnuefi/3.0.17/ia32/gnuefi/libgnuefi.a
